admin_comments_description: Review pending comments before they appear publicly.
admin_metric_overview_description: Manage posts, assets, comments, API tokens, and site settings for {name}.
admin_moderation_queue_detail: {count} comment is waiting for review. New public comments default to pending.
admin_posts_description: Create bilingual drafts, publish Markdown, and manage status.
admin_settings_help: Basic identity, SEO, RSS, comments, and primary language configuration.
admin_storage_contract_detail: D1 owns structured records. R2 owns images, imports, exports, and backups.
account_management_note: Use the CMS admin area to manage publishing, settings, and exports.
api_description: Use scoped API tokens for publishing, imports, exports, assets, and comment moderation.
blog_description: Articles about the Cloud Blog CMS template, Cloudflare-native storage, Markdown publishing, and automation workflows.
comments_description: New comments are held for review before publication.
feature_api_body: Automation surfaces for developers and AI agents.
feature_d1_body: Posts, comments, settings, users, and API tokens.
feature_moderation_body: Pending comments, Turnstile, rate limits, and spam review.
feature_r2_body: Images, imports, exports, attachments, and backups.
home_bilingual_intro_en: EN: Cloud Blog CMS is a Cloudflare-native personal publishing system with visual writing, Markdown import, bilingual content, and AI-ready automation.
home_bilingual_intro_zh: 中文：Cloud Blog CMS 是面向个人创作者的 Cloudflare 原生发布系统，支持可视化写作、Markdown 导入、中英文内容和 AI 自动化。
home_tags_description: Browse by publishing workflow, Cloudflare infrastructure, and AI automation.
login_error: An error occurred while signing in.
signup_error: An error occurred while signing up.
